results.rendered_html:
ayuj a. Not being in couples, odd, uneven (opp. yuj even); ayuji nayugarephato yakāro yuji tu najau jaragāśca puṣpitāgrā  V. Ratn. 
Comp.
— iṣuḥ, -bāṇaḥ, -śaraḥ N. of Cupid (having
5 arrows).
— chadaḥ = saptavarṇa (Mar. sātavaṇa); vavurayukchadagucchasugaṃdhayaḥ  Śi. 6. 50. 
— palāśaḥ = saptapalāśa.
— pādayamakaṃ a kind of alliteration having the same syllables (in a different sense) in the first and third pādas.
— netra, -locana,
— akṣa, -śaktiḥ N. of Śiva.
